# Chronic Reload

> Your ultimate source for gaming news, hardware reviews, and curated game discovery.

## About
Chronic Reload is a dedicated gaming blog focusing on high-quality, honest hardware reviews, curated game lists (including cozy games, indie gems, roguelikes, and survival games), and breaking industry news.

## Content Pillars
- [Games](https://chronicreload.com/games) - Curated game recommendations, reviews, and lists.
- [Hardware & Gear](https://chronicreload.com/hardware) - Mechanical keyboards, monitors, gaming laptops, and headsets reviews.
- [News](https://chronicreload.com/news) - Industry news and upcoming release dates.

## Key Pages
- [About Us](https://chronicreload.com/about) - Learn more about our team and editorial mission.
- [Contact](https://chronicreload.com/contact) - Get in touch with us for tips or queries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://chronicreload.com/privacy-policy) - Our data and privacy practices.
